commands.review_summary:
Adds a gateway agent regression test that simulates daily session rollover with a stored user provider/model override and asserts the rotated session keeps the override fields.

PR surface: Tests +73. Total +73 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. The source path and proposed test simulate the daily rollover/store-merge behavior, but the PR author explicitly did not run a real Gateway/TUI session across UTC midnight.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is maintainer proof handling, not an automated code repair; the test itself is focused and has no review finding.

target.title: test(gateway): cover rollover model override preservation
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a focused gateway agent regression for daily session rollover with a user-selected model override.
- Verifies a stale pre-midnight session rotates to a new session id while preserving the stored user `providerOverride`, `modelOverride`, and `modelOverrideSource` fields.
- Keeps the change test-only; no runtime behavior is changed in this PR.

## Linked context
Related #89087

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
- Behavior or issue addressed: session model override preservation across a daily/UTC-midnight rollover path.
- Real environment tested: local contributor checkout only.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Evidence after fix: targeted shard passed `1` test file / `145` tests, including the new rollover override regression.
- Observed result after fix: the regression captures a rotated session entry and confirms the user override remains `ollama-cloud/deepseek-v4-pro` while the session id changes.
- What was not tested: no live OpenClaw Gateway/TUI session was run across a real UTC midnight boundary.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: this is a regression-coverage PR; it does not attempt to use private local session state or live model credentials for midnight proof.
- Before evidence: issue #89087 reports the observed midnight override loss on OpenClaw 2026.5.26.

## Tests and validation
- `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check -- src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts`

## Risk checklist
Did user-visible behavior change? (`No`)
Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`No`)
Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`No`)
What is the highest-risk area? Test coverage drifting from the real midnight path; mitigated by exercising the existing gateway agent daily-reset logic and persisted session-entry merge path.

## Current review state
Ready for maintainer review. No author-side blocker is known; live midnight reproduction remains outside this contributor environment.
